mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM exam ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam(exam_name, subject_id, start_time, end_time, duration, total_score, creator_id, status) VALUES(#{examName}, #{subjectId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{creatorId}, #{status})
